name: Base
description: Base profile containing fundamental metadata attributes for any FAIR Digital Object. Provides essential provenance, identification, and descriptive information.
ExpectedUse: Foundation profile for all FAIR Digital Objects, ensuring consistent core metadata across diverse research outputs including datasets, software, publications, and experimental records.

Properties.Name: FDO_profile
Properties.Title: FDO profile
Properties.Description: Handle identifier(s) pointing to the FDO profiles that defines the record structure for a FAIR Digital Object.

Properties.Name: creator
Properties.Title: Creator
Properties.Description: ORCID URL(s) identifying the creator(s) or author(s) of a research output, dataset, or digital object.

Properties.Name: creatorAffiliation
Properties.Title: Creator Affiliation
Properties.Description: ROR (Research Organization Registry) identifier(s) for the institutional affiliation(s) of creators and contributors.

Properties.Name: dateCreated
Properties.Title: Date Created
Properties.Description: ISO 8601 datetime stamp indicating when a resource, dataset, or digital object was originally created.

Properties.Name: dateModified
Properties.Title: Date Modified
Properties.Description: ISO 8601 datetime stamp indicating when a resource, dataset, or digital object was last modified or updated.

Properties.Name: keyword
Properties.Title: Keyword
Properties.Description: Subject keyword or phrase describing the topical content of a resource for discovery and classification purposes.

Properties.Name: name
Properties.Title: Name
Properties.Description: Human-readable name or title assigned to a resource for identification and display purposes.

Properties.Name: description
Properties.Title: Description
Properties.Description: Free-text description providing contextual information about a resource's content, purpose, or characteristics.
